items.title: fix(telegram): derive media placeholders from MIME
items.summary: fix(telegram): derive media placeholders from MIME Fixes #69793. Verification: - repro before fix: `pnpm test:serial extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.body.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` failed 3 new cases with `` returned for non-image/mixed saved media - `pnpm test:serial extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.body.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` passed 9 tests after fix - `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.body.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.body.test.ts` - `git diff --check` - `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 pnpm testbox:run --id tbx_01kqtnnhpg6rk1225tbb7109kf -- "pnpm check:changed"` passed
